role: anima × hexa-lang 공통 진화 단계 (P0~P5). 각 단계 owner + 상태만 기록 — 실측 수치는 breakthroughs, 수렴은 convergence 참조

owners.anima: anima 의식 엔진 / 모델 / 학습 루프

phases.title: Hexa-native 학습 루프 (T2 100M)
phases.exit_condition: T2 100M ≤ 50 ms/step 및 evolution chain 공개
phases.note: 100M 스펙 4x gap 잔존 (cold hardware 필요) — 알고리즘 한계 아님

phases.title: anima decoder 포팅 (Phase A→B→C)
deliverables: full GQA N_HEAD=4 N_KV=2 + Wo + residual (Phase C)

sub_phases.title: Full backward BLAS (W_q/k/v/o/down/up/gate)
sub_phases.verification: audit 2026-04-10T7 — all 3 backward BLAS builtins present, registered, dispatched

phases.title: 제타 (Zeta) 서빙 + 1B 학습
phases.target: CLM from-scratch (34M→1B) + ALM LoRA (7B→14B) + eval 5-metric PASS + 한국어 자연 대화 + latency < 200ms/token

blockers.detail: sustained 25 GF ceiling, cold window 필요

resolved_blockers.final_metric: kv_cache serving_tok_s=251.68 best, margin_x=1.97 over 128 target
resolved_blockers.note: prior gap_x=43 was SEQ=128 prefill mis-divided into 1 token. honest serving tok/s via kv_cache_decode_bench.

phases.eta_note: Path C 기준 ~3주 (JIT 1주 + C codegen 1주 + serving 1주)

hexa_side_tracks.note: hexa-lang 단독 트랙 — P0~P5 core 와 병행. 실측 수치는 state.json breakthroughs 참조. schema 확장: 기존 consumer 가 읽지 않음.

rt36_bytecode_vm.title: bytecode VM wave 2 — AST tree-walk → linear BC + dispatch loop

phases.title: VM dispatch loop + `hexa run --vm` CLI flag + AST→BC bridge MVP

progress_20260414_pm.milestone: Bridge MVP LANDED — rt#36-C C milestone complete

deferred_to_rt36_e: Lambda emit (free-var 분석 + CLOSURE emit + CALL 다형 dispatch)

open_followups: T38 AST→BC 브릿지 잔여 (VM opcode 추가로 deferred 3종 해소 + whole-program --vm default 승격 준비)

phases.title: Full coverage + verify_suite + perf measurement (≥2× fib, ≥3× call_heavy)
Closure capture — Lambda emit + STORE_UPVAL + block-body + nested

steps.title: Lambda emit 배선 — free-var analysis + CLOSURE + NEW_CLOSURE_UPVAL
bt#85 baseline 측정 — 프레임 풀 O(N) rebuild 병목 확정 (fib 0.92×, gate FAIL)
bt#85 ship — VM helpers in-place refactor → fib 6.09× / call_heavy 7.79× (gate PASS)
Lambda block-body — bc_mk_lambda 2-body 지원 + bc_compile_expr 분기
steps.note: source_landed (4b32877) + free-var scan Call 분기 builtin/known-proto 제외 (bc_collect_free_vars_expr) → 양 모드 PASS. 원인: Call callee name이 무조건 free var로 수집되어 outer emit에서 LOAD_GLOBAL 'print'로 떨어지면서 VM trap. Fix: bc_lookup_proto(name)≥0 또는 print/println/len builtin이면 수집 제외. 검증: /tmp/lb.hexa block-body print + user fn helper() + if/else + nested lambda 전부 interp==vm 일치, closure_mvp/closure_store_upval 그대로.

steps.title: --vm/--bc CLI flag wiring — args() 파싱 + 'run' subcommand skip + HEXA_VM 환경변수와 OR
steps.test: closure_mvp 양 모드 PASS, run --vm/--vm/HEXA_VM=1 3-path 일치
steps.note: STORE_UPVAL (T56 #2 본체) + bc_vm cell registry는 본 커밋에서 분리 — 별도 T 카드로 후속.

steps.title: Cell registry — LOAD_UPVAL deref + STORE_UPVAL write-through + pre-scan hoisted-slot tracking
steps.test: closure_store_upval 5/15/27/20 + closure_mut_cell two-closure 42 + closure_order_independent reader→writer 0/42 + 14/14 rt36-d PASS
steps.note: HOIST_CELL + cell deref/write-through + bc_prescan_hoist_set order-independent pre-scan. Stage0 rebuilt.

steps.title: Block-body lambda implicit return — last ExprStmt → RETURN instead of RETURN0
steps.note: bc_compile_lambda_proto detects last ExprStmt and emits RETURN with TOS value. Previously always RETURN0 (void).

steps.title: Interp closure arena use-after-free — val_closure heapify + runtime.c struct_store case
steps.note: val_closure captured_env arena-allocated → fn return 후 포인터 무효화. __HEXA_ARENA_HEAPIFY_RETURN__ 라운드트립으로 수정. runtime.c에 TAG_STRUCT heapify case 추가.

steps.title: ForStmt — ForRangeStmt (counter desugar) + ForArrayStmt (ARR_GET iteration) + bridge + free-var + mutation scan
steps.note: for i in 0..5 → counter-based while (no array alloc). for item in arr → ARR_GET + ARR_LEN. bridge 자동 Range 감지. bc_collect_free_vars + bc_free_var_is_mutable_in_stmts 양쪽 지원.

steps.title: VM coverage boost — to_string/to_int/to_float/type_of builtins + UseStmt no-op + ARR_GET dict/string polymorphism
steps.note: 4 new opcodes (64-67) + UseStmt/ImportStmt bridge skip + ARR_GET/ARR_SET map+string fallback. Coverage gap #1(77 files) + #2(41 files) 해소.

steps.title: FloatLit bridge + print/println split + MatchExpr VM bridge + implicit-return fn/if/match bodies
steps.test: 16/16 rt36-d PASS (new match_mvp) + to_string(3.14)→"3.14" + print/println newline + nested match + fact(5)=120 (if-expr fn body) + max a>b match (non-literal scrutinee) + abs if-else body
steps.note: 5 돌파: (1) FloatLit bridge bc_mk_float_lit — 이전엔 bc_mk_int_lit(0) 폴백 → to_string(3.14)=="0" 버그. (2) OP_PRINTLN=68 + A operand nargs → print 無 newline, println 附 newline, 0-arg/multi-arg 지원. (3) MatchExpr 브릿지 — fresh local scrutinee, arm-mainspring LOAD_LOCAL+pat+EQ+JMPF 체인, Wildcard 무조건 매치, 마지막 ExprStmt 값 인라인. (4) fn body 암시적 리턴 — 마지막 stmt가 ExprStmt/IfExpr/IfStmt/MatchExpr이면 RETURN 값, 아니면 RETURN0. (5) bc_compile_block_as_expr 헬퍼 — IfExpr body도 동일 규칙 적용 → fact = if n<=1 { 1 } else { n*fact(n-1) } 정상 동작. 가드+or-pattern+enum pattern은 후속.
